technique_description: 方框呼吸法采用简单的4-4-4-4模式——吸气、屏息、呼气、屏息——每个动作持续四秒。它能激活副交感神经系统，降低压力，使你恢复平静专注的状态。
session_complete_msg: 呼吸练习完成得很好。花点时间感受一下你的身体感觉——更轻盈、更稳定、更放松。

app_complete_message: You've completed the Box Breathing session. You should feel more balanced and calm.
app_description: Box breathing uses a simple 4-4-4-4 pattern — inhale, hold, exhale, hold — each for four seconds. It activates your parasympathetic nervous system, lowering stress and bringing you back to a calm, focused state.
instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath
